category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/scala-ide/scalariform describes Scalariform as a Scala source code formatter.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/scala-ide/scalariform uses Scalariform as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface linked by source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/scala-ide/scalariform, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Scala source code formatter.
